name: copilot-chime
description: Audio notifications for GitHub Copilot. Hear a chime when tasks complete, when Copilot needs your input, or when terminal commands finish. Never miss a prompt again.

languageModelTools.name: copilotChime-notify
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Plays an audible notification chime for the user. Call this tool whenever: (1) you have finished a significant task or multi-step operation and want to notify the user ('complete'), (2) you need the user to review something, answer a question, make a decision, approve a plan, or provide input before you can continue ('prompt'), or (3) something unexpected happened that the user should be aware of ('attention'). Always prefer type 'prompt' when you are waiting on the user.

type.description: The kind of chime to play. Use 'complete' when a task finishes, 'prompt' when user interaction is needed, 'attention' for important alerts.

message.description: Optional short message shown to the user alongside the chime.

copilotChime.enabled.description: Enable or disable all Copilot Chime sounds.

copilotChime.onTerminalComplete.description: Play a sound when a terminal command completes (useful for Copilot agent mode).

copilotChime.onToolComplete.description: Play a completion chime when Copilot calls the #chime tool with type 'complete'.

copilotChime.onToolAttention.description: Play an attention chime when Copilot calls the #chime tool with type 'attention'.

copilotChime.onToolPrompt.description: Play a prompt chime when Copilot needs user interaction, input, or approval.

copilotChime.terminalDebounceMs.description: Debounce interval (ms) for terminal completion chimes. Prevents rapid chimes when multiple commands run in sequence.

copilotChime.volume.description: Volume level for chime sounds (0.0 to 1.0).

copilotChime.completeSound.description: Sound to play on task completion.

copilotChime.attentionSound.description: Sound to play when user attention is needed.

copilotChime.promptSound.description: Sound to play when Copilot needs user interaction or approval.
